raw_text: {"intent":"Compile durable memory from a small preference table.","decision":"Store the two preference facts as separate memory cards with high confidence; no conflicts detected.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"preference","statement":"Sam prefers Bill Evans.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Bill Evans","type":"person","role":"preferred entity"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"prefers","object":"Bill Evans"}]},{"kind":"preference","statement":"Daniele prefers knowledge graphs.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Daniele","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"knowledge graphs","type":"topic","role":"preferred topic"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Daniele","predicate":"prefers","object":"knowledge graphs"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"No ambiguous or duplicate entities requiring resolution."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"Stored two preference facts: Sam -> Bill Evans; Daniele -> knowledge graphs.","citations":["input table row 1","input table row 2"],"repair_options":[],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Parsed 2 rows.","No supersession or deletion indicated.","Committed 2 memory cards."]}}
